tasks.label: Sign PowerShell script
tasks.detail: Signs the selected .ps1 file with the first available code-signing certificate in CurrentUser\My using SHA-256 and a timestamp server.
args: $cert = Get-ChildItem Cert:\CurrentUser\My -CodeSigningCert | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $cert) { throw 'No code-signing certificate found in CurrentUser\My.' }; Set-AuthenticodeSignature -FilePath '${workspaceFolder}\${input:scriptToSign}' -Certificate $cert -TimestampServer 'http://timestamp.digicert.com' -HashAlgorithm SHA256 -IncludeChain NotRoot

tasks.label: Update checksums
tasks.detail: Regenerates checksums.txt with SHA-256 hashes for every .ps1 file in the workspace root.
args: Set-Location -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}'; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter *.ps1 -File | Sort-Object Name | Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 | ForEach-Object { '{0}  {1}' -f $_.Hash.ToLower(), (Split-Path $_.Path -Leaf) } | Set-Content -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\checksums.txt' -Encoding ASCII; Get-Content -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\checksums.txt'

inputs.description: Select the PowerShell script to sign
